speaker: GOWER
text: Now sleep yslackèd hath the rout;

speaker: GOWER
text: No din but snores about the house,

speaker: GOWER
text: Made louder by the o’erfed breast

speaker: GOWER
text: Of this most pompous marriage feast.

speaker: GOWER
text: The cat with eyne of burning coal

speaker: GOWER
text: Now couches from the mouse’s hole,

speaker: GOWER
text: And crickets sing at the oven’s mouth

speaker: GOWER
text: Are the blither for their drouth.

speaker: GOWER
text: Hymen hath brought the bride to bed,

speaker: GOWER
text: Where, by the loss of maidenhead,

speaker: GOWER
text: A babe is molded. Be attent,

speaker: GOWER
text: And time that is so briefly spent

speaker: GOWER
text: With your fine fancies quaintly eche.

speaker: GOWER
text: What’s dumb in show I’ll plain with speech.

speaker: GOWER
text: By many a dern and painful perch

speaker: GOWER
text: Of Pericles the careful search,

speaker: GOWER
text: By the four opposing coigns

speaker: GOWER
text: Which the world together joins,

speaker: GOWER
text: Is made with all due diligence

speaker: GOWER
text: That horse and sail and high expense

speaker: GOWER
text: Can stead the quest. At last from Tyre,

speaker: GOWER
text: Fame answering the most strange enquire,

speaker: GOWER
text: To th’ court of King Simonides

speaker: GOWER
text: Are letters brought, the tenor these:

speaker: GOWER
text: Antiochus and his daughter dead,

speaker: GOWER
text: The men of Tyrus on the head

speaker: GOWER
text: Of Helicanus would set on

speaker: GOWER
text: The crown of Tyre, but he will none.

speaker: GOWER
text: The mutiny he there hastes t’ oppress,

speaker: GOWER
text: Says to ’em, if King Pericles

speaker: GOWER
text: Come not home in twice six moons,

speaker: GOWER
text: He, obedient to their dooms,

speaker: GOWER
text: Will take the crown. The sum of this,

speaker: GOWER
text: Brought hither to Pentapolis,

speaker: GOWER
text: Y-ravishèd the regions round,

speaker: GOWER
text: And everyone with claps can sound,

speaker: GOWER
text: “Our heir apparent is a king!

speaker: GOWER
text: Who dreamt, who thought of such a thing?”

speaker: GOWER
text: Brief, he must hence depart to Tyre.

speaker: GOWER
text: His queen, with child, makes her desire—

speaker: GOWER
text: Which who shall cross?—along to go.

speaker: GOWER
text: Omit we all their dole and woe.

speaker: GOWER
text: Lychorida, her nurse, she takes,

speaker: GOWER
text: And so to sea. Their vessel shakes

speaker: GOWER
text: On Neptune’s billow. Half the flood

speaker: GOWER
text: Hath their keel cut. But Fortune, moved,

speaker: GOWER
text: Varies again. The grizzled North

speaker: GOWER
text: Disgorges such a tempest forth

speaker: GOWER
text: That, as a duck for life that dives,

speaker: GOWER
text: So up and down the poor ship drives.

speaker: GOWER
text: The lady shrieks and, well-anear,

speaker: GOWER
text: Does fall in travail with her fear.

speaker: GOWER
text: And what ensues in this fell storm

speaker: GOWER
text: Shall for itself itself perform.

speaker: GOWER
text: I nill relate; action may

speaker: GOWER
text: Conveniently the rest convey,

speaker: GOWER
text: Which might not what by me is told.

speaker: GOWER
text: In your imagination hold

speaker: GOWER
text: This stage the ship upon whose deck

speaker: GOWER
text: The sea-tossed Pericles appears to speak.
